paper_title: HTLM: Hyper-Text Pre-Training and Prompting of Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Hyper-Text Language Model (HTLM) leverages simplified HTML (MHTML) for pretraining, introducing size hints for masked spans to improve length control during generation. It enables structured HTML-based prompting for zero-shot/few-shot tasks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 23TB of simplified HTML (Minimal-HTML, MHTML) extracted from Common Crawl
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot/few-shot text generation, summarization, classification, table-to-text generation, and structured document processing.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (code/models released for future research)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling hyper-text language models to leverage structured document-level supervision for improved zero-shot and few-shot task generalization.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Span-masked denoising autoencoding with size hints
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Structured HTML-based prompting for generation/classification tasks
raw_extraction.extension: Size hints for masked spans enable precise length control during reconstruction, allowing for more robust auto-prompting and improved data efficiency.
raw_extraction.paper_title: HTLM: Hyper-Text Pre-Training and Prompting of Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Hyper-Text Language Model (HTLM) leverages direct pre-training on simplified HTML documents, enabling structured zero-shot prompting via HTML tags and attributes. This approach outperforms natural-language-only baselines in zero-shot generalization and data-efficient fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale web crawl of simplified HTML documents
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot text generation, summarization, table-to-text generation, classification, and natural language understanding tasks.
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned in paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling structured zero-shot prompting and improving data efficiency in language models through hyper-text pre-training.
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM) on simplified HTML documents
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Structured zero-shot prompting and fine-tuning with HTML templates
raw_extraction.extension: Hyper-text prompting enables structured task representation via HTML tags and attributes, allowing for precise control over output format and semantic alignment.
raw_extraction.paper_title: HTLM: Hyper-Text Pre-Training and Prompting of Language Models
